text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, Trainer… Your hair's 
sticking straight up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe. It almost reminds me 
of a horsegirl's ears.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that means we match today. 
Hehe♪
